name: golang-github-cloudfoundry-jibber-jabber-dev
title: golang-github-cloudfoundry-jibber-jabber-dev
summary: Cross Platform locale detection for Golang
description:
Cross Platform locale detection for Golang
Jibber Jabber is a GoLang Library that can be used to detect
an operating system's current language.
OS Support OSX and Linux via the LC_ALL and LANG environment
variables. These are standard variables that are used in ALL versions
of UNIX for language detection.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-cloudfoundry-jibber-jabber-dev because Cross Platform locale detection for Golang.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-cloudfoundry-jibber-jabber-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-cloudfoundry-jibber-jabber-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-cloudfoundry-jibber-jabber-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
